text: A bankruptcy court sanctioned attorney Kathleen Wilson after she admitted using generative AI to prepare a Supplemental Response and other pleadings without verifying the output. The filings contained AI-generated citations to nonexistent cases, including In re Garcia and In re Buttermilk Towne LLC.
canonical_source_conflicted: Genuine case law; Fed. R. Bankr. P. 9011
mitigation_gap: Failed to review or verify admittedly AI-generated content before filing.
reliance_or_harm: False citations submitted to the court; sanctions and mandatory AI education imposed.
